title: Verdict
description: Stage 3 (adversarial verification) output: per-finding rulings with concrete evidence, plus surviving class siblings which become new ledger entries (DESIGN.md Stage 3, 2026-07-07 contract). `overall` is derive-and-check: the workflow derives it mechanically from per_finding (accept iff all fixed; reject if any not_fixed/regression_introduced; else partial_accept) and REJECTS a verdict whose asserted overall disagrees — consistency checked, not trusted.

evidence.description: What was checked, concretely: files read, scenarios attempted (Gate 3 rejects rulings without this).

class_siblings_found.description: Surviving instances of the same defect class found during class-check — each becomes a NEW ledger entry.

regression_risks.description: Cross-finding regression concerns not tied to a single ruling.

standards_violations.description: Diff-wide standards scan results. An empty list is a statement, not an omission.

overall.description: Derivable from per_finding; the workflow re-derives and rejects on disagreement.

reject_reason.description: Required in substance unless overall=accept (enforced by the workflow, not the schema).
